fr-CA.BASELINE_FLUSH: Alignement de la Ligne de Base
fr-CA.BASELINE_GEO_ALIGNED: Alignement Geo De La Ligne De Base
fr-CA.BASELINE_JUSTIFIED: Justification de la Ligne de Base
fr-CA.CAPLINE_FLUSH: Alignement de la Ligne du Haut
fr-CA.CAPLINE_GEO_ALIGNED: Alignement Geo de la Ligne du Haut
fr-CA.CAPLINE_JUSTIFIED: Justification de la Ligne du Haut
fr-CA.ERROR_THIS_TEXT_INDEX: Unable to load text data at index {0}
fr-CA.MIDLINE_FLUSH: Alignement de la ligne du millieu
fr-CA.MIDLINE_GEO_ALIGNED: Alignement Geo de la Ligne du Millieu
fr-CA.MIDLINE_JUSTIFIED: Justification de la Ligne du Millieu
fr-CA.MISC_DEVELOPER: Square3ang & Kkitut. Display everything as you wish. Thank you for being with Overlayer.
fr-CA.NAME: Nom
fr-CA.OUTLINE_COLOR: Couleur De La Couche Exterieur Du Texte
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ABSMAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable Absolute Max XAccuracy in the current tile(Excluding checkpoints)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ACTUALPROGRESS: Current Actual Progress based on time
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ARTISTRAW: Composer of the song (with rich tags)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ATTEMPTS:
Shows Attempts.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_COLORRANGE: You can adjust the color from any color to any color you want based on a specific tag. Use with <color>.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_CT: Current Too Early + Current Too Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_CV: Current Very Early + Current Very Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_DEATHS: The total number of planet explosions on the current map
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_DEFAULTTEXTCOLOR: Default text color of the level
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_DEFAULTTEXTSHADOWCOLOR: Default text shadow color of the level
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_DIFFICULTYRAW: Fixed difficulty return value regardless of language setting
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_EASEDVALUE: When the tag value changes, the tag value changes according to the speed.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_EDITORPITCH: Pitch set in the LevelEditor (displayed as 1 when 100%)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_FRAMETIME: Time difference between the previous frame and the current frame in ms
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATE: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in MB per tick
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATEGB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in GB per tick
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATEKB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in KB per tick
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in MB
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in GB
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in KB
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISAUTOENABLED: Displays true if auto is enabled, false otherwise
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISNOFAILENABLED: Displays true if No-fail Mode is enabled, false if disabled
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISOLDAUTOENABLED: Displays true if Old Auto is enabled, false if disabled
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISPRACTICEMODEENABLED: Displays true if practice mode is enabled, false otherwise
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISSPEEDTRIALENABLED:
Displays true if Speed Trial Mode is enabled, false otherwise.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ISSTARTED: Displays false if not started, or true if started by pressing any key
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_LELP: Lenient Early Perfect + Lenient Late Perfect
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXT: The name text displayed at the top of the level.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTCOLOR: The color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTRAW: The name text displayed at the top of the level. (with rich tags)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTSHADOW: The shadow color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MARGINCOMBO:
Displays the combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginCombo:VeryLate})
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MARGINCOMBOS:
Displays all combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MARGINMAXCOMBO:
Displays the maximum combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginMaxCombo:VeryLate})
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MARGINMAXCOMBOS:
Displays all maximum combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginMaxCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MAXACCURACY: The highest achievable Accuracy in the current tile
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable XAccuracy in the current tile
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MOVINGMAN: You can animate text on criterion certain tags. Used with <size>.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MULTIPRESSCOUNTER: The percentage of the multipress gauge.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_MULTIPRESSCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the multipress gauge in the game.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_NELP: Normal Early Perfect + Normal Late Perfect
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_NT: Normal Too Early + Normal Too Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_NV: Normal Very Early + Normal Very Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_OELP: Official Early Perfect + Official Late Perfect
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_OT: Official Too Early + Official Too Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_OV: Official Very Early + Official Very Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_OVERLOADCOUNTER: The percentage of the overload gauge.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_OVERLOADCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the overload gauge in the game.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_PITCH: Speed set in CLS (displayed as 1 when at 1x speed)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_SELP: Strict Early Perfect + Strict Late Perfect
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_SPECIALPLAYMARK:
Displays a special mark based on your play performance:
PP = perfect  FC+ = no miss
FC = full combo  XX = no special mark
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_ST: Strict Too Early + Strict Too Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_SV: Strict Very Early + Strict Very Late
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_TILEANGLE: The angle of the current tile
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_TILEENTRYANGLE: Indicates the entry angle from the entry tile to the current tile.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_TILEEXITANGLE: Indicates the exit angle from the current tile to the next tile.
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_TIMING: Error range showing the timing of keystrokes in ms from the center of the tile
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_TITLERAW: Title of the song (with rich tags)
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by Unity, not including the entire process memory
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in GB, not including the entire process memory
fr-CA.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in KB, not including the entire process memory
fr-CA.UPDATE_RATE_LIMITED: Update or Version check Rate Limited!
fr-CA.UPDATER_INFO_JSON_NOT_FOUND: info.json not found in the update package
fr-CA.UPDATER_SAME_VERSION_DETECTED: Update package version matches the current version
fr-CA.UPDATER_VERSION_CHECK_ERROR: Version parse or asset fetch failed:
